mission: Cycle 14 stash-pop incident 의 cycle 15 in-flight 5 file HEAD-reset residual 복구. cycle 16 README curation agent 가 일부 복구 (domains/_index.json + domains/biology/_index.json) 후 잔여 3 file (state/falsifier_monitor/audit.jsonl + domains/biology/hexa-weave/hexa-weave.md frontmatter + reports/n6_own_doc_lint.json) cycle 17 에서 직접 복구.

context.incident_root_cause: cycle 14 stash-pop 시 macOS provenance xattr (com.apple.provenance / com.apple.quarantine) 가 git stash unlink syscall 차단 -> stash apply 만 partially 작동, pop 의 drop step 실패 -> stash entry 잔존 + working tree 일부 file HEAD content 로 reset. cycle 15 5 file in-flight edits 손실.
context.previously_disclosed_in: commit 5fd60d4d body raw 91 C3 STASH-POP DATA LOSS section

domains/biology/_index.json v1.0.0 -> 1.2.0 (+1.1.0 hexa-nanobot domain entry + 1.2.0 hexa-ribozyme domain entry; _domains_count 1 -> 3)

F-RB-1..5 already in HEAD via cycle 15/16.

raw_91_c3_honest_disclosure.user_description_vs_disk_divergence: cycle 15 user-described step3.d/axiom 18 + vkappa_membership_induction_mechanical lemma but on-disk content was step2.a/c re-apply with axiom count 17 (commit 5fd60d4d) — likely from same stash-pop event; cycle 17 recovery preserves on-disk reality not user-description.
raw_91_c3_honest_disclosure.audit_jsonl_total_target_14_rows: kick_falsifier_audit_cycle15 declared 14 rows (1 F-CL-FORMAL-4 status + 1 F-CL-FORMAL-4-AXIOM-RESIDUAL progress + 8 F-W9 + 4 F-W5-DISPATCH). Cycle 17 actually appended 14 rows = 11 audit-cycle rows + 3 F-MANUAL-LOGIN-CYCLE15 rows (per manual-login-cycle15-verify kick) — cumulative net +14 vs kick contract (audit kick 14 + manual-login kick 5 = 19, minus 5 already in HEAD via cycle 15/16 = 14 net). Honest accounting.
raw_91_c3_honest_disclosure.five_of_five_recovery: 100% — all 5 files HEAD-reset by cycle 14 stash-pop now reconstructed in working tree.

raw_142_d2_backup_preserved.policy: before any destructive operation (stash-pop, reset --hard, checkout --), cp -p target target.bak first; recovery from .bak on rollback
raw_142_d2_backup_preserved.cycle_17_application: audit.jsonl modification used append-only (no overwrite), so .bak unnecessary; hexa-weave.md modification used Edit tool with old_string anchor (atomic; reversible via git diff)
raw_142_d2_backup_preserved.future_stash_avoidance: raw 142 D2 + raw 91 C3: macOS provenance xattr presence -> stash-pop unsafe. Avoid stash; instead use direct commits OR worktree branches (git worktree add) for context switching.

raw_47_sister_metadata_consistency.axis_triangle_validation: biology-axis tri-sister (composition: hexa-weave / actuation: hexa-nanobot / catalysis: hexa-ribozyme) requires consistent forward/reverse linkage:
raw_47_sister_metadata_consistency.domains_index_json: biology axis count = 3 (hexa-weave, hexa-nanobot, hexa-ribozyme) PASS

raw_47_sister_metadata_consistency.hexa_nanobot_md_frontmatter_check_pendin: cycle 18 verify hexa-nanobot.md + hexa-ribozyme.md sisters back-link to hexa-weave (raw 47 reverse-linkage check)

future_stash_pop_avoidance_user_recommen.incident_pattern: macOS provenance xattr (com.apple.provenance / com.apple.quarantine / com.apple.macl) on files written by GUI editors / downloaded artifacts / Finder-copied files -> git stash internal unlink syscall returns EPERM -> stash apply partial + drop fails -> reset to HEAD on tracked files
future_stash_pop_avoidance_user_recommen.recommendation_1: AVOID git stash pop / git stash apply on this repo until xattr layer audit complete
future_stash_pop_avoidance_user_recommen.recommendation_2: USE git worktree add /path/to/scratch-branch <branch> for context switching instead of stash
future_stash_pop_avoidance_user_recommen.recommendation_3: USE direct commits to feature branches instead of stash; rebase/cherry-pick later
future_stash_pop_avoidance_user_recommen.recommendation_4: IF stash necessary, run xattr -lr <repo> first to inspect; xattr -d com.apple.provenance <file> to clear before stash
future_stash_pop_avoidance_user_recommen.recommendation_5: raw 142 D2: cp -p <target> <target>.bak before any potentially-destructive git operation

report_to_user_korean: cycle 17 stash-pop-loss-recovery 완료. cycle 14 사고로 HEAD-reset 된 5 파일 모두 working tree 에 복구. cycle 16 readme-curation agent 가 2 파일 (domains/_index.json + domains/biology/_index.json) 복구; cycle 17 가 잔여 3 파일 복구 (audit.jsonl +14 rows append / hexa-weave.md frontmatter sisters + requires / reports/n6_own_doc_lint.json 재생성). own_doc_lint 결과 own#3/#4/#16 PASS; own#1 10 위반 모두 cycle 11-14 proposal pre-existing CJK (cycle 15/16/17 deliverable 0). 향후 stash-pop 회피 권장 (macOS provenance xattr 가 git stash unlink 차단).
